events.event_description: U.S. Embassy established in Guyana upon independence, with Delmar Richard Carlson presenting credentials as the first Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary.

evidence.quote: Delmar Richard Carlson, Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1966-06-16. Credentials presented: 1966-08-17. Left post on 1969-09-13.
